narrative:
Olive Township has 1,133 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.6 percentage points.
